ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cryptocurrencies" (
  "coin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptocurrency */,
  "coin_name" TEXT /* Full name of the cryptocurrency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol or abbreviation of the cryptocurrency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the cryptocurrency */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cryptocurrency was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cryptocurrency's information was last updated */,
  "whitepaper_url" TEXT /* URL to the cryptocurrency's whitepaper */,
  "blockchain_type" TEXT /* Type of blockchain (e.g., Proof of Work, Proof of Stake) */,
  "genesis_date" TEXT /* Date when the cryptocurrency's blockchain was launched */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "markets" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market */,
  "market_name" TEXT /* Name of the market or exchange */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the market */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the market or exchange */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the market was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the market's information was last updated */,
  "registration_required" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if user registration is required to trade on the market */,
  "fees" TEXT /* Description of the trading fees */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the market operates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user's information was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for programmatic access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the watchlist */,
  "coin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency being watched */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market or exchange being watched */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the watchlist was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the watchlist was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* User's notes or comments about the watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the alert */,
  "coin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency being monitored */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market or exchange being monitored */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was last updated */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered, disabled) */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the alert (e.g., once, daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "coin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market or exchange */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume */,
  "market_cap" INTEGER /* Market capitalization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the price record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the price record was last updated */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source from which the price data was obtained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prices_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prices_coin_id FOREIGN KEY ("coin_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("coin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_history" (
  "price_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price history record */,
  "price_id" INTEGER /* ID of the price record */,
  "delta" REAL /* Delta value for the price record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the price history record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the price history record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_history_price_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_id") REFERENCES prices ("price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_volumes" (
  "volume_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading volume record */,
  "coin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market or exchange */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trading volume record */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trading volume record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trading volume record was last updated */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source from which the trading volume data was obtained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volume_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_volumes_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_volumes_coin_id FOREIGN KEY ("coin_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("coin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_capitalizations" (
  "market_cap_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market capitalization record */,
  "coin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market or exchange */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market capitalization record */,
  "market_cap" INTEGER /* Market capitalization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the market capitalization record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the market capitalization record was last updated */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source from which the market capitalization data was obtained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_cap_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_capitalizations_coin_id FOREIGN KEY ("coin_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("coin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_capitalizations_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source's information was last updated */,
  "api_key_required" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if an API key is required to access the data source */,
  "api_documentation_url" TEXT /* URL to the data source's API documentation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_feeds" (
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data feed */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "coin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market or exchange */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the data feed (e.g., real-time, daily, weekly) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data feed was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data feed was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data feed (e.g., active, paused, error) */,
  "last_synced_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last successful synchronization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_feeds_coin_id FOREIGN KEY ("coin_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("coin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_feeds_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_feeds_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data feed */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data point */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was last updated */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source from which the data point was obtained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_feed_id FOREIGN KEY ("feed_id") REFERENCES data_feeds ("feed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chart */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the chart */,
  "coin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market or exchange */,
  "chart_type" TEXT /* Type of chart (e.g., line, bar, candlestick) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the chart was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the chart was last updated */,
  "chart_title" TEXT /* Title of the chart */,
  "chart_description" TEXT /* Description of the chart */,
  "chart_period" TEXT /* Period of the chart (e.g., 1D, 1W, 1M) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charts_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charts_coin_id FOREIGN KEY ("coin_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("coin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chart_data" (
  "chart_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chart data point */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chart */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the chart data point */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the chart data point */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the chart data point was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the chart data point was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chart_data_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES charts ("chart_id")
)
